content.problemStatement:
I've been livin' with devils and angels 

Angels, angels 

Realize you and I are in the same boat 

Same boat, yeah

Given an integer NNN, for each 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1\le i \le N1‚Č§i‚Č§N, find the value of:

‚ąĎj=1N(j‚ąí1j‚ąí‚Ćäj‚ąí1i‚Ćč‚ąí1)\large{\sum_{j = 1}^{N} {j - 1 \choose j - \left\lfloor \frac{j - 1}{i} \right\rfloor - 1}}j=1‚ąĎN‚Äč(j‚ąí‚Ćäij‚ąí1‚Äč‚Ćč‚ąí1j‚ąí1‚Äč)Since the answer can be very large, print it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.

Note that (XY){X \choose Y}(YX‚Äč) refers to XXX choose YYY.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of one integer NNN.


Output Format
For each test case, print NNN space-separated integers, denoting the value of the given equation for 1‚Č§i‚Č§N1\le i \le N1‚Č§i‚Č§N, modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10610^6106.
